turns.source_text: My worst fear when I finally get over someone Those damn what ifs
turns.user_message: I keep running through what-ifs in my head even though it's pointless. My brain just won't let things go.
I replay conversations from days ago trying to figure out if I said something wrong. I can't turn it off even when I want to.
My head is so loud all the time that I can't enjoy anything anymore. Every small decision turns into this spiral I can't escape.
